mapper.select: select c.contr_id,c.func_id,c.contr_code,c.contr_name, c.contr_url,c.method_type,c.last_chg_usr, c.last_chg_dt,c.contr_remark, c.ENCODE_CHECK,c.NONCE_CHECK, m.menu_id,m.menu_name from admin_sm_res_contr c LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON c.func_id = m.func_id ${ew.customsqlsegment}

SELECT DISTINCT t_resctrl.func_id,t_resctrl.contr_code,t_resctrl.contr_name,t_resctrl.contr_url,t_resctrl.method_type,t_reco.sys_id FROM admin_sm_auth_reco t_reco JOIN ( SELECT t_user.user_id user_id, t_user.org_id org_id,t_user.dpt_id dpt_id,t_roelrel.role_id role_id FROM admin_sm_user t_user LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user_role_rel t_roelrel ON (t_user.user_id=t_roelrel.user_id) ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) t_authobj ON( (t_reco.authobj_type='U' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.user_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='R' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.role_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='G' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.org_id) OR (t_reco.authobj_type='D' AND t_reco.authobj_id = t_authobj.dpt_id) ) JOIN admin_sm_res_contr t_resctrl ON (t_reco.authres_type ='C' AND t_reco.authres_id=t_resctrl.contr_id)

SELECT r.AUTH_RECO_ID, r.AUTHRES_ID, c.contr_name AS node_name, r.menu_id AS up_tree_id, r.authres_type FROM admin_sm_auth_reco r INNER JOIN admin_sm_res_contr c ON r.authres_id = c.contr_id WHERE r.authobj_id = #{id}
and r.data_tenant_id = #{dataTenantId}
select c.contr_code, c.contr_name, c.contr_Url, c.func_id, c.method_type, r.sys_id from admin_sm_res_contr c LEFT JOIN admin_sm_auth_reco r on c.contr_id = r.authres_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT r.AUTH_RECO_ID, r.AUTHRES_ID, c.contr_name AS node_name, r.menu_id AS up_tree_id, r.authres_type FROM admin_sm_auth_reco r INNER JOIN admin_sm_res_contr c ON r.authres_id = c.contr_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT c.contr_id,c.func_id,c.contr_code,c.contr_name, c.contr_url,c.method_type,c.last_chg_usr, c.last_chg_dt,c.contr_remark, m.menu_id,m.menu_name FROM admin_sm_auth_reco a INNER JOIN admin_sm_res_contr c ON a.authres_id = c.contr_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_menu m ON c.func_id = m.func_id ${ew.customsqlsegment}
SELECT contr_url,method_type,encode_check,nonce_check FROM admin_sm_res_contr WHERE (ENCODE_CHECK='01' OR NONCE_CHECK='01') AND method_type = 'POST'
